Defendant Firs Republic Bank'S Motion To Compel Arb And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bethany Vasquez, Esq., of the Miller Law Group, Tel. 415.464.4300, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
John W. Harrington, Esq., of the Law Offices of Waukeen McCoy, Tel. 415.675.7705, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued and the court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FIRST REPUBLIC BANK'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is denied. The agreement is procedurally unconscionable. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Defendant Firs Republic Bank'S Motion To Compel Arb And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Continued To Mar-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bethany Vasquez, Esq., and Mary L. Guilfoyle, Esq., from Miller Law Group, 415-464-4300, for Defendant and moving party
John W. Harrington, Esq., from Law Offices of Waukeen McCoy, 415-675-7705, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling.
Defendant First Republic Bank's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is continued to 3/20/12 at 9:30 a.m., supplemental reply by 3/15. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Notice Of Motion Andm Otion To Compel Arb And Stay Proceedings; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FIRST REPUBLIC BANK'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is Continued to March 8 per the exparte order filed February 28, 2012. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
